masthead.title: Lemma Oracle
masthead.tagline: Ground‑truth infrastructure for verifiable, private AI data.

features.verifiedDataBody: Ground your AI in cryptographically verified facts. Lemma's verified-attributes API returns only ZK-proven data to your AI — eliminating hallucinations at the source.
features.privacyBody: Your AI gets verified answers — never the raw data. Documents stay encrypted end-to-end; Lemma itself never sees plaintext.
features.shareBody: Control exactly which attributes your AI can access. Prove 'age ≥ 18' without exposing the actual age, name, or address.

footer.copyright: © 2026 FRAME00 — Built for decisions that matter

rebuild.title: Rebuild site
rebuild.intro: This page is not linked from the site. Use it to trigger a rebuild and redeploy of the static site (e.g. after updating content in Affine).
rebuild.option1Desc: Open the workflow page and click Run workflow.
rebuild.option2Desc: From a script or external service (e.g. after Affine updates), send a POST request with a Personal Access Token (PAT). This site is static, so a plain GET to this page cannot start the workflow without credentials.
rebuild.option2CurlNotePrefix: Store the PAT in your environment or a secret store; do not commit it. The workflow listens for

layout.defaultDescription: A reasoning engine for long‑horizon decisions
